item.title: A message from Mme. Bourdon:
item.description: Beavertail Day is Coming to STA! On Tuesday, March 10th, the Bytown Beavertails mobile truck will be rolling into STA during both lunch periods to serve up warm, sweet goodness! Classic Beavertails are $10 each, made fresh and served at lunch. Mme Bourdon will visit each Grade 7/8 class in the morning to collect orders. High School students can grab their tickets during their lunch hour. Tickets are on sale until Friday. Don’t miss your chance to enjoy this tasty winter treat

item.title: A message from Mr. Vonesch:
item.description: Today we are offering the sacrament of confession for students and staff. Grade 7/8 teachers - please come to the chapel at the scheduled time. Confessions will be available to high school students during period 3. If you have any questions, don't hesitate to see Mr. Vonesch. Thank you!

item.title: A message from Ms. Clouthier:
item.description: Congratulations to our 7&8 Boys Basketball Team. Yesterday, our team won both of their games — including an intense overtime victory against St. FX! The boys showed incredible determination, worked hard from start to finish, and never gave up. They stayed positive, encouraged one another, demonstrated outstanding sportsmanship, and played amazing basketball. Your coaches are so proud of the way you represented our school both on and off the court! Way to go, team!
